# Addon Submission

## Addon Information

**Addon Name:**

<!-- Enter the name of your addon. -->

**Your Discord User ID:**

<!-- Make sure you have Developer Mode enabled in Discord, click on your profile in the left bottom corner, and click "Copy User ID" -->

**Your Korone Profile URL:**

<!-- Example: https://www.pekora.zip/users/[id]/profile -->

## Detailed Description

<!--
Provide a detailed description of:

- What the addon is
- What the addon does
- How it works
- Why it is useful
- Any external APIs or third-party services it uses
- Any permissions it requires
- Any warnings, limitations or disclaimers
-->

## Submission Checklist

You must check every applicable box before submitting this pull request.

<!-- to check a box put an X in it
example: [X] I agree ...
-->

* [ ] I confirm that I have read the repository `[README.md](https://github.com/davidstown/korone-unofficial-addons/blob/main/README.md)` in full.
* [ ] I confirm that my addon follows all addon guidelines and submission requirements.
* [ ] I confirm that my addon contains exactly one JavaScript userscript file.
* [ ] I confirm that my addon includes a complete `README.md`.
* [ ] I confirm that my addon is fully open source and contains no obfuscated code.
* [ ] I confirm that this addon is my original work and is not copied, stolen or “skidded”.
* [ ] I have disclosed every external API, third-party service and permission used by the addon.
* [ ] I confirm that the addon does not contain malicious, deceptive, privacy-invasive or harmful functionality.
* [ ] I understand that submitting malicious code or intentionally violating the guidelines may result in the rejection or removal of my addon and punishment on Korone.
* [ ] I understand that approval does not make my addon official or officially supported by Korone.
* [ ] I agree to create the required post in the `#unofficial-addons` Discord forum if my addon is approved.
* [ ] I did not blindly check every box without reading and understanding each statement.

## Additional Information

<!--
Add screenshots, videos (__REQUIRED__), testing information, known issues or anything else reviewers should know.
-->
